description: Add npm keywords to all plugins from airbnb through doordash to improve discoverability on npm search. Extends existing keywords array with MCP and AI agent related terms.
qualityChecks: echo 'Verifying package.json changes...' && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const plugins=['airbnb','airtable','amplitude','asana','aws-console','azure','bestbuy','bitbucket','bluesky','booking','calendly','chatgpt','chipotle','circleci','claude','clickhouse','clickup','cloudflare','cockroachdb','coinbase','confluence','costco','craigslist','discord','docker-hub','dominos','doordash'];let ok=true;for(const p of plugins){const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('plugins/'+p+'/package.json','utf8'));if(!pkg.keywords||pkg.keywords.length<2){console.error(p+': missing keywords');ok=false;}if(!pkg.keywords.includes('mcp')){console.error(p+': missing mcp keyword');ok=false;}}if(!ok)process.exit(1);console.log('All plugins in batch 1 have correct keywords');"

userStories.title: Add npm keywords to plugins airbnb through doordash
userStories.description: Add MCP and AI agent related keywords to the keywords array in all 27 plugin package.json files from airbnb through doordash (alphabetical). Each plugin currently has keywords: ["opentabs-plugin"]. Add additional keywords for npm discoverability.
acceptanceCriteria: Every plugin package.json in the batch has keywords array containing at minimum: opentabs-plugin, opentabs, mcp, modelcontextprotocol, chrome-extension, ai-agent, browser-automation
The existing opentabs-plugin keyword is preserved (first position)
No other fields in any package.json are modified

All 27 plugins are updated: airbnb, airtable, amplitude, asana, aws-console, azure, bestbuy, bitbucket, bluesky, booking, calendly, chatgpt, chipotle, circleci, claude, clickhouse, clickup, cloudflare, cockroachdb, coinbase, confluence, costco, craigslist, discord, docker-hub, dominos, doordash
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/airbnb/package.json
- plugins/airtable/package.json
- plugins/amplitude/package.json
- plugins/asana/package.json
- plugins/aws-console/package.json
- plugins/azure/package.json
- plugins/bestbuy/package.json
- plugins/bitbucket/package.json
- plugins/bluesky/package.json
- plugins/booking/package.json
- plugins/calendly/package.json
- plugins/chatgpt/package.json
- plugins/chipotle/package.json
- plugins/circleci/package.json
- plugins/claude/package.json
- plugins/clickhouse/package.json
- plugins/clickup/package.json
- plugins/cloudflare/package.json
- plugins/cockroachdb/package.json
- plugins/coinbase/package.json
- plugins/confluence/package.json
- plugins/costco/package.json
- plugins/craigslist/package.json
- plugins/discord/package.json
- plugins/docker-hub/package.json
- plugins/dominos/package.json
- plugins/doordash/package.json

Context:
All plugins currently have `"keywords": ["opentabs-plugin"]`. We need to add discoverability keywords so these show up when people search npm for MCP-related packages. The `opentabs-plugin` keyword must remain (it's used for npm auto-discovery by the MCP server).

Changes:
For each plugin, change the keywords array from:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin"
]
```
To:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin",
    "opentabs",
    "mcp",
    "modelcontextprotocol",
    "chrome-extension",
    "ai-agent",
    "browser-automation"
]
```

The pattern is identical for every plugin in this batch. Use a script or manual editing — the change is the same for all 27 files.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify any field other than keywords
- Do NOT change the description, opentabs field, or any other package.json content
- Keep `opentabs-plugin` as the first keyword (it's used for npm auto-discovery)
- Keep JSON formatting consistent: 2-space indent, keywords array with each entry on its own line (matching existing style)
- Do NOT touch plugins/e2e-test (not a real plugin)
